keyPoints: My Big Mother Loves Pizzas - MoMLP ( Models, Organizations, Processes, People, Products)
Most Brilliant Minds Lead Projects - MBMLP ( Management, Benefits, Risks, Roles, Responsibilities, Scope, Schedule, Stakeholders, Team)
MoMLP - Models, Organizations, Processes, People, Products
MBMLP - Management, Benefits, Risks, Roles, Responsibilities, Scope, Schedule, Stakeholders, Team
Models - Tools to represent the project
Processes - The steps taken to complete the project
Products - The deliverables of the project
Benefits - The advantages of the project
Risks - The potential problems of the project
Roles - The responsibilities of the team members
Responsibilities - The tasks assigned to the team members
Scope - The boundaries of the project
Schedule - The time frame of the project
Stakeholders - The parties that are affected by the project
Team - The members of the project team
